'''Helb''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] broker for stolen tech equipment in a gang called the [[Tech Raiders]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He once hired [[Fligh]] to steal a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] from [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Uta S'orn]].<ref name="The Deadly Hunter" /> When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] came looking for information, he revealed to [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] that Fligh owed credits to the Raiders.
